narrative:
Noble Township has 3,020 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.1 percentage points.
